name: citation-graph-example
description: Citation-graph presentation viewer for @msagl/renderer-webgl (short node labels + rich hover tooltips)

scripts.build: rm -rf ../../website/static/citation-graph/* && esbuild ./src/app.ts --outfile=../../website/static/citation-graph/app.js --bundle --minify && esbuild ./src/worker.ts --outfile=../../website/static/citation-graph/worker.js --bundle --minify && cp index.html rise_3k.json ../../website/static/citation-graph

author: levnach@microsoft.com
